name: YUNDA Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunda Holding Co., Ltd. provides integrated logistics services in China. It offers express delivery, franchise, and other services. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Xinhai Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yunda Holding Co., Ltd. in January 2017. Yunda Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Shanghai, China.
